title: Moontide
writer: John O'Hara, Willard Robertson, Nunnally Johnson
actors: Jean Gabin, Ida Lupino, Thomas Mitchell
plot: In California, Bobo and his mooching pal Tiny are doing odd jobs and getting drunk and they hide a secret about the unsolved murder of sailor Pop Kelly but suicidal waitress Anna, saved by Bobo, unravels the mystery.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
